sprint.summary: Harness doctrine installed. Escape menu auto-dismissal. v1.4.7 compat. Engine heartbeat crash detector. Readiness trigger. LaunchForgeContinue.cmd with 3-phase auto-chain and crash guards. PauseMenuAutoResumeService for multitasking. Game crashes natively at Quyaz post-market-intel — command consumed but engine exits.

proof.autoUnpause: NOT PROVEN — crash blocks campaign runtime
proof.tradeRoute: NOT REACHED — native crash at Quyaz

handoff.gap: No native crash marker. Auto-unpause not proven at runtime.
handoff.blocker: Game crashes natively at Quyaz during trade route market intel ~2min in. Native crash outside C# try-catch.
